notableEvents.label: Oswald Peraza pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Oswald Peraza challenged (pitch result), call on the field was confirmed: Oswald Peraza called out on strikes.

notableEvents.label: Vaughn Grissom pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Vaughn Grissom grounds into a double play, shortstop Chase Meidroth to second baseman Sam Antonacci to first baseman Munetaka Murakami. Mike Trout out at 2nd. Vaughn Grissom out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Vaughn Grissom GIDP

notableEvents.label: Sam Antonacci plunked
notableEvents.detail: Angels challenged (hit by pitch), call on the field was upheld: Sam Antonacci hit by pitch. Munetaka Murakami scores. Miguel Vargas to 3rd. Austin Hays to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Chase Meidroth pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Chase Meidroth grounds out, second baseman Vaughn Grissom to first baseman Nolan Schanuel.
